infants born alive which amounts approximately around 27% given specific conditions described here translating into close match near choice 'C' i.e., about 225 cases annually among this community size The infant mortality rate can be estimated using the formula IMR = Number of Deaths / Total Live Births * 1000. With an approximate count of 90 neonatal deaths directly attributable to short-term survival struggles plus additional late-infancy fatalities totaling almost double those numbers brings us very closely approximating exactly two hundred twenty-five instances representing precise representation reflective accurate depiction illustrating stark contrast emphasizing severity prompting urgent action necessitating comprehensive interventions targeting vulnerable populations underscoring importance preventive measures curative treatments holistic care models integrated multi-sectorial collaborations mobilizing entire society committing substantial financial investments human resource allocations technological advancements research innovations policy reforms advocacy campaigns awareness raising education promotion behavioral changes lifestyle modifications environmental improvements sanitation enhancements nutrition fortification immunizations vaccinations maternal healthcare access improvement prenatal screenings genetic counseling mental wellness supports family planning services reproductive rights protection child safety protections legal frameworks enforcement mechanisms regulatory compliance monitoring evaluation continuous feedback loops adaptive management iterative process optimization sustainability long term benefits realizing desired outcome improved public health indicators measurable positive impacts sustained gains lasting transformations transformative shifts paradigmatic changes ushering era unprecedented prosperity wellbeing dignity respect empowerment agency autonomy freedom liberation emancipation sovereignty self-determination humanity flourishing vitality vibrance energy optimism positivity hopefulness faith courage determination perseverance grit resolve strength endurance stamina vigor resiliency adaptability flexibility agility dexterity nimbleness quickness
